keyInsights.title: Stack frontend de la app
keyInsights.insight: Frontend basado en React 19, Vite 6, Tailwind CSS 4, react-router-dom 7, i18next + react-i18next y @sentry/react.

keyInsights.title: Stack backend de la app
keyInsights.insight: Backend basado en Express 5, realtime con ws WebSocketServer y runtime Node.js ESM + tsx. Entrada principal: server.ts.
